insight: For MCP servers wrapping CLI binaries, a setup script (TLS cert gen + .env write + firewall instructions) is the single highest-leverage DX improvement -- it takes TTHW from 10min to 5min without changing architecture
Add duration_ms to every audit log JSONL entry alongside ts/tool/args/exit -- negligible cost, enables future P90 latency analysis without instrumentation changes
Go internal packages cannot be tested from external modules. Write _test.go files inside the internal package itself, or use go test ./... from the module root.
json.Unmarshal on empty []byte returns unexpected-end-of-JSON error. Always guard with len(data)==0 check before unmarshal when reading from files that may not yet be initialized.
